data.title: Update project docs to reflect CLI_user tag and Gate 1a skip
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing documentation to reflect the new CLI_user tag and Gate 1a skip behavior.
**Why**: Future agents reading CLAUDE.md, ticket CLI reference docs, and fix-bug documentation need accurate awareness of the --tags flag and CLI_user skip behavior.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section (ticket system description), ticket-cli-reference.md (--tags flag), CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md if applicable
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the ticket CLI reference documents the --tags flag on ticket create
  ← Satisfies: "ticket create supports a --tags flag that sets tags atomically at creation time"
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md architecture section reflects the CLI_user tag and Gate 1a skip behavior
  ← Satisfies: "/dso:fix-bug Gate 1a skips the intent-search agent dispatch for bugs tagged CLI_user"

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions
